Package neqsim.process.operations

Class OperationalTagBinding

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.operations.OperationalTagBinding
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class OperationalTagBinding extends Object implements Serializable
Defines how a logical P&ID or operating tag maps to NeqSim and plant data.

A binding can point to an existing MeasurementDeviceInterface tag, a ProcessAutomation address, or both. This lets agents and applications keep private historian tag names outside public models while still running generic operational studies.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

      Returns the engineering unit used by this binding.

      Returns the tag role for field-data integration.

      Checks whether a historian tag is configured.
      Returns:
      true when the binding has a historian tag

      Checks whether a NeqSim automation address is configured.
      Returns:
      true when the binding has an automation address
